agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific int

report.hypothesis: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions with ECL2/ECL3, while mutating position 11 to hydrophobic residues (L/I/V) will reduce off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 binding by avoiding unfavorable steric clashes.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: Current designs are binding strongly to SSTR2 and are selective (Δmargin > 0), b

report.hypothesis: Current designs are binding strongly to SSTR2 and are selective (Δmargin > 0), but structural issues are limiting pass rate. Tightening clash tolerance and increasing candidate diversity should improve structural quality while preserving selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Tighten clash tolerance to improve structural quality and reduce false positives with poor geometry.
Increase the number of candidates to improve chances of finding structurally valid and selective designs.
